title: sophora exigua var. elatior
intro: Sophora exigua var. elatior, also known as the Japanese sophora, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sophora exigua var. elatior include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
